mapper.sql:
a.id AS "id", a.send_time AS "sendTime", a.zu_id AS "zu.id", a.title AS "title", a.imgs AS "imgs", a.video AS "video", a.sound AS "sound", a.pdf AS "pdf", a.type AS "type", a.name AS "name", a.size AS "size", a.miao AS "miao", a.create_date AS "createDate", a.update_date AS "updateDate",
zu.name AS "zu.name"
LEFT JOIN t_kejian_zu zu ON zu.id = a.zu_id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_kejian( id, send_time, zu_id, title, imgs, video, sound, pdf, type, name, size, miao, create_date, update_date ) VALUES ( #{id}, #{sendTime}, #{zu.id}, #{title}, #{imgs}, #{video}, #{sound}, #{pdf}, #{type}, #{name}, #{size}, #{miao}, #{createDate}, #{updateDate} )
mapper.update: UPDATE t_kejian SET send_time = #{sendTime}, zu_id = #{zu.id}, title = #{title}, imgs = #{imgs}, video = #{video}, sound = #{sound}, pdf = #{pdf}, type = #{type}, name = #{name}, size = #{size}, miao = #{miao}, update_date = #{updateDate} WHERE id = #{id}
